steps.title: Translate the point structure
steps.content: Each draw earns 1 point, so $d$ draws yield $1 \cdot d = d$ points. Each win earns 3 points, so $w$ wins yield $3 \cdot w = 3w$ points.

steps.title: Form the total equation
steps.content:
Total points = points from draws + points from wins = 41:
$$d + 3w = 41$$

steps.title: Evaluate each choice
steps.content:
• A) $d + 3w = 41$ — 1 point per draw and 3 per win, matching the problem. Correct.
  • B) $3d + w = 41$ — swaps the point values, giving draws 3 points and wins 1 point. Wrong.
  • C) $d + \frac{w}{3} = 41$ — divides wins by 3 instead of multiplying. Wrong.
  • D) $\frac{d}{3} + w = 41$ — divides draws by 3 and gives only 1 point per win. Wrong.
That confirms A is correct.
